business_angle: Ellis Plumbing & Heating Services Birmingham centred on bathroom refits and installations in Birmingham, B14
distinctive_phrases: Ish came out at short notice to repair and service an old boiler for my niece who has learning difficulties
He quoted a price before the visit and that's what he charged
Ish fitted me a beautiful new bathroom complete with tiling , plumbing, heating and all my appliances
Nothing was to much of an ask and he went above and beyond to fix some unforeseen issues that I had
Ishmael provided me with a new radiator and installation

strongest_review_quote.text: Ish came out at short notice to repair and service an old boiler for my niece who has learning difficulties.  He ensured there was hot water and heating to all radiators and everything is working perfectly since his visit last week.  He quoted a price before the visit and that's what he charged.  Even though the boiler was old, he didn't try to get us to install a new boiler just before Christmas, but gave an honest assessment of what might go wrong, but was able to keep it going for us for now.
strongest_review_quote.author: Tim

best_photos_rationale: Google Places photos preferred for gallery when high quality
claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
pitch_hook_summary: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Tim)
